purpose: Filled polygon only; isolates basic brush, pen, and POLYGON16 output.
Text only; isolates EXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW and EXTTEXTOUTW handling.
Simple shape and text together; checks whether Paint fails only once text is combined with normal drawing.
Rounded rectangle only; isolates ROUNDRECT records.
Polygon clipped with CSS clip-path; isolates path clipping records.
Bitmap only; isolates STRETCHDIBITS without transforms.
Bitmap with rotation; isolates SETWORLDTRANSFORM plus STRETCHDIBITS.
Stroke-only dashed line; isolates dashed CREATEPEN style and POLYLINE16 output.
Very tall page with shape only; isolates Paint behavior on capped tall-page headers without text.
Very tall page with text only; isolates tall-page header plus EMF text records.
Compound evenodd fill; checks whether Paint fails on multi-subpath fill content without text or images.
Single closed path filled via FILLPATH with winding fill; isolates whether Paint accepts path painting at all.
Single closed path filled via FILLPATH with evenodd fill; isolates whether Paint rejects ALTERNATE fill mode even without compound geometry.
Compound path filled with winding fill; isolates whether the failure needs multiple subpaths or specifically evenodd compound filling.
